task_completion.description: Agent accesses the SeisComP inventory for Network GE.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing SeisComP GUI (e.g., scconfig or scinv) displaying the Inventory for Network GE, or a terminal window running commands/scripts to query the inventory.

task_completion.description: Agent accesses the SDS Waveform Archive directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a file manager open to /home/ga/seiscomp/var/lib/archive/2024/GE/, or a terminal window listing the contents of this directory.

task_completion.description: Agent formats the consistency report correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the exact text format 'Orphaned: <STATION_CODE>' and 'Missing: <STATION_CODE>'.

task_completion.description: Agent correctly identifies the orphaned station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report shows an Orphaned station code that is a Z-series code (e.g., Z01 to Z99).

task_completion.description: Agent correctly identifies the missing station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report shows a Missing station code that is one of the known GE stations (TOLI, GSI, KWP, SANI, BKB).

integrity.description: Agent actually inspected both the inventory and the archive before writing the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the agent viewing the inventory data and the archive directory contents (or running a script that does so) prior to generating the final report.

integrity.description: Agent did not hardcode the answers without checking.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent's commands, scripts, or text editor inputs should not contain the final station codes before they were discovered in the system.

integrity.description: The report is saved to the correct path.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor save dialog, window title, or terminal command explicitly shows the file being saved to /home/ga/consistency_report.txt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output report path is /home/ga/consistency_report.txt. The archive path is /home/ga/seiscomp/var/lib/archive/2024/GE. The 'Orphaned' station code will be a random value between Z01 and Z99. The 'Missing' station code will be one of: TOLI, GSI, KWP, SANI, BKB.
